amendment_target: Proposal for a regulation — Article 37 — paragraph 3
body_md:
**Target:** Proposal for a regulation — Article 37 — paragraph 3

## Text proposed by the Commission

3. The Commission shall ensure that all confidential information obtained in the course of its investigations pursuant to this Article is treated confidentially.

## Amendment of the European Parliament

3. The Commission shall ensure that all sensitive information obtained in the course of its investigations pursuant to this Article is treated confidentially.
commission_text: 3. The Commission shall ensure that all confidential information obtained in the course of its investigations pursuant to this Article is treated confidentially.
parliament_text: 3. The Commission shall ensure that all sensitive information obtained in the course of its investigations pursuant to this Article is treated confidentially.
